title: Sugarcane Chip Tray 19.5x14.5cm Pack of 50 White Compostable Food Tray for Takeaways, Festivals, Carnivals, Cafes, BBQs, Parties, Events & Picnics
features: Material & Strength: Chips trays are made from Bagasse, which is a renewable, compostable material and is made from sugar cane. That's why it is more durable than other biodegradable food trays created from materials like cardboard

Eco-Friendly: Environmentally safe trays for eating food in home, shop and takeaway. These food containers are completely compostable just throw it in your home compost heap and it'll be gone in a few weeks. A good alternative to plastic trays for food

Save Your Time: Time is money so after a happy event like get together, weddings, parties and birthdays you do not need to wash lots of Dinnerware and waste your precious time, simply place them in the recycling bin. You can use these bagasse bowls also to serve other type of foods like hot meals, desserts, cold salads etc

Package & Dimensions: Each package contain 50 snack tray and each tray dimension is 19.5x14.5x2.5cm. Additionally, they will look great on any table and give your mealtimes a classy, contemporary touch
Warranty: Suitable for party food trays or disposable bowls for hot food as well. Love our product or we'll buy them back from you, no questions asked!
description: Product Description Live Beside Sugarcane Chip Tray Holds up well for hearty meals, desserts, snacks, and salads — no mess, no fuss! Stronger and more durable than cardboard or paper-based trays. Durable & Sturdy Design Perfect for serving hot, cold, or oily foods without bending, leaking, or getting soggy. Sleek, contemporary design enhances the presentation of any meal. A classy alternative to plastic or paper trays , great for both casual and formal occasions. Environmentally safe trays for eating food in home, shop and takeaway. Each package contain 50 snack tray and each tray dimension is 19.5x14.5x2.5cm. Disposable and hassle-free no need to spend hours cleaning dishes after parties, birthdays, weddings, or BBQs.
